---
title: "Week 3 - Visualizations"
---

> During this lecture, we will explore the functionality of ggplot2 and begin our entry into the tidyverse. For this lecture, have the datasets downloaded and put in the appropriate place in your files

[Full Screen](slides-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
